deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Closed May 1 2026. Building CMA template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report, build first analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: Borregas Property
deals.notes: Development opportunity with Isaac Linares. Title defect blocked deal. Sisters lost interest. Signs picked up. Walking away.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs picked up last week. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.
Chris updated sisters on showing. They were excited about Isaac Linares development interest - mobile homes with veteran units.
Title defect confirmed. Correction deed to be prepared by Van Hutchins attorney.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when timing is right. Underwater $93K-$143K. Short sale path recommended but sellers elected to hold.

logs.m: Listing terminated - Matt and Chandler moving back in. Will relist after updates/repairs. Relationship intact, ended on good terms.
Call with Matt and Chandler - presented three options (short sale, assumption, cash to close). Chandler was laid off. Leaning toward short sale.
Full market analysis sent - $350K-$400K realistic market value vs $493K payoff.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft. June deadline for seller relocation to NC. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Multiple showings underway.
deals.next: Follow up with second-look buyers agent on movement, confirm next showing time

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - they love the floorplan and maintenance. Offered pre-inspection report. Rescheduled showing to May 30.
Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300. Texted Jose and Katy, keeping conversation open.
MLS live, sign and lockbox dropped, neighborhood canvassed, first showing at 9:15am.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce sale. 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K. Need $285K-$290K minimum to walk with proceeds. CMA shows $295K recommended list price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender, confirm acreage, get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property - CMA pulled, payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026, net sheet built.
Prior clients - helped with original VA renovation loan. Going through divorce, need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Cleanup underway - drywall crew patching, utilities being set up. Listing agreement still needed. Police reports pending.
deals.next: Call utilities to confirm service setup, replace camera batteries, submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching remaining holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Police reports still pending.
Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician/plumber. Utility companies identified.
Work officially starting with Matt Toney/SA Remodelers. Dumpsters dropping this weekend.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer's agent Javier. Chicago Title handling escrow.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from Javier

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family, buyer's agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent to update third party financing. EMD not yet received.
Price reduced to $117,500, MLS updated. Exclusions locked in. Commission box correction still needed on amendment.
Clearing complete - Steve finished and sent photos. Drone footage needed for marketing.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash transaction $152K. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature.
deals.next: Confirm commission received, deliver Joy gift basket, thank you notes pending

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, thank you baskets still pending.
Lien release picked up from notary - Fernando Castillo signed. Released delivered to Chicago Title.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo - willing to work with us on lien resolution.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold by landlord. 916 Marriott ruled out - foundation issues. Pivoted to new construction, no HOA requirement. Now evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal via Isaac at $85K with FHA 203k financing.
leads.next: Follow up with Zach on 203k feasibility for 301 W Saxet, follow up after Isaac and Mike phone call

logs.m: Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Two structures - demo second one, FHA 203k for main home. Zach sent property info for evaluation.
Sent showingnew.com link for new construction browsing. New construction strategy launched.
Rental being sold by landlord. Pivoted to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran's mom. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target $1000/month payment. Builder rate buydowns are the angle. Multiple builder options being pulled. Not locked to any community.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep is signed, pull builder options, set up new home search platform

logs.m: Need to follow up with Milagros - ask Brandon what is going on with her timeline and interest level.
Intro email sent, buyer rep signature packet sent via Skyslope, copy sent to Brandon separately.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden community. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration and trust-based real estate opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up personally, ask permission to share her story

logs.m: Community connection - grief and healing through plants. Potential content collaboration pending permission.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St, plans to sell soon. Property ~90% complete, having trouble finishing. Working with another realtor currently. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market deal opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress, offer to promote listing to buyer network

logs.m: Met at garden event. Property ~90% complete, having trouble finishing. Already working with another realtor.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area, follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA, pricing, next steps. This is priority alongside Colton Brown prep.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Zero down, no PMI opportunity.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info on next site visit, qualify wife VA eligibility, connect with VA lender

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio. Renting, looking to buy.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation - details pending. Caught up May 11.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full details on buyer and property needs

logs.m: Jerome reached out about buyer needing fixer property. Unique situation details pending.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor's Son
leads.detail: Son inherited property after recent death of parent (avid gardener). Has not been contacted yet. Probate/inherited property - may want to sell. Garden angle is natural connection.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat, reach out to son with neighborhood/gardener angle

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped him start in real estate. Two opportunities: Green Bliss rental listing (uncle's property) and his mom Milagros as new construction buyer. Builder registration on first visit critical.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signed for Milagros, schedule builder visit, pull property manager options

logs.m: Builder outreach in progress. MI Homes option from Frank under review. Rate buydown strategy being developed.
Buyer rep signed for Milagros. Multiple builder options being pulled.
Met Brandon - Green Bliss rental and his mom Milagros as new construction buyer both in play.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Investor and capital partner. Bringing deals - 301 W Saxet wholesale, Howell buyer assignment potential, development opportunities. Active collaboration on multiple fronts. Key strategic partner.
leads.next: Continue deal flow, follow up on all active transactions together

logs.m: Brought 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K for Howell buyers. Two structures, FHA 203k angle.
Met for lunch after 10023 Mill Path consultation. Discussed development concepts and partnership possibilities.
